document_info.exam_name: Dehli Police Constable Previous Paper Held On 03 Dec 2020 Shift 3

archive_data.question_text: 'इंडिया' केसव और ______ द्वारा लिखित भारत में महिला क्रिकेट का इतिहास, ब्लैकपेज्ड वेजेस... बालकृष्ण तथा पटनायक भ्रातृचार्य बृजनाथ

explanation.english: The book 'India' documenting the history of women's cricket in India was co-authored by Kesav and Brijnath Patnaik. The correct answer to fill in the blank is Brijnath Patnaik.
explanation.tanglish: India'il mahilkal cricket varalarai pathrigira 'India' endra puthagathai Kesav matrum Brijnath Patnaik al ezhuthiyullar. blank il fill seyyavendiya sariyana pathil Brijnath Patnaik.

archive_data.question_text: दिल्ली एनसीटी (NCT) हेतु लोकसभा की ______ सीटें आवंटित की गई हैं

explanation.english: The National Capital Territory (NCT) of Delhi has been allotted 7 seats in the Lok Sabha (Lower House of Parliament).
explanation.tanglish: Delhi National Capital Territory (NCT) ku Lok Sabha il 7 seatgal vagadikkappattullana.

archive_data.question_text: ______ के अंतर्गत की सरकार द्वारा अनुमानित व्यय और आय का वार्षिक वित्तीय कथन दोनों सदनों के समक्ष प्रस्तुत किया जाना अनिवार्य किया गया है।

explanation.english: Article 112 of the Indian Constitution mandates that the Government must present an annual financial statement (budget) before both Houses of Parliament every year.
explanation.tanglish: Article 112 anbhu India arasiyal sattathin paadi, arasu varudam thorum budget endra varusha sorndi kurippai irattai mandrangalukkum munbu prasthuthikka vendum enbathai kurikkum.
